description_long: This shotgun features a long, rectangular barrel with a dark, almost black finish and subtle texturing along its length. The body is angular and blocky, with a pronounced, red-colored trigger and a matching pistol grip that stands out against the otherwise dark coloration. The top of the shotgun has a raised sight or rail near the rear, suggesting a place for aiming or mounting accessories. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on straight lines and sharp edges. The trigger guard is distinctively shaped, with a slight curve and a robust appearance, providing protection for the trigger. The shotgun lacks a traditional stock, instead featuring a compact rear section that ends abruptly behind the grip.
description: A dark, angular shotgun with a long rectangular barrel, red pistol grip, and a compact rear section without a traditional stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, the red pistol grip, and the compact rear section.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the grip beneath it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the red grip and trigger visible, and the blocky body clearly outlined.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the barrel and the compact, stockless rear, with the grip barely visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long rectangular barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Curved, medium-sized trigger guard with a robust, protective shape and no visible finger grooves
